title: Release Package Script Settings
description: maksit-certs-ui: container images (Web API + Web UI) and Helm chart to OCI. No NuGet packages or zip archives. ReleasePublishGuard (before Docker/Helm) controls allowed branches and tag rules; publish plugins omit branches. Engine aligned with maksit-repoutils.

plugins.name: Plugin module name (for example, DotNetDockerPush -> plugins/DotNet/DotNetDockerPush.psm1). Lookup: engines/release/custom, then plugins/Platform, DotNet, Npm.
plugins.stageLabel: Execution phase: test, qualityGate, build, or release (lowercase). Plugin failures stop the run and report RELEASE FAILED.
plugins.enabled: If true, the plugin is imported and Invoke-Plugin is called in the configured order.
plugins.DotNetReleaseVersion: Reads <Version> from the first projectFiles entry; ReleasePublishGuard checks tag on HEAD matches when tagVersionMustMatchDotNetRelease is true.
plugins.projects: DotNetTest: array of test project paths relative to engines/release. Requires utils/modules/TestRunner.psm1 (multi-project Cobertura aggregation).
plugins.resultsDir: DotNetTest: optional; when multiple projects are listed, TestRunner uses engines/release/TestResults if omitted.
plugins.projectFiles: QualityGate: add .csproj paths when scanVulnerabilities is true (dotnet list package --vulnerable).
plugins.scanVulnerabilities: QualityGate: false = no dotnet list; true requires projectFiles. failOnVulnerabilities optional when scan is true (default true).
plugins.coverageThreshold: QualityGate: >0 requires line % on shared context (qualityLineCoverage, coverageLineRate, or testResult.LineRate). 0 disables.
plugins.credentialsEnvVar: DotNetDockerPush / DotNetHelmPush: env var with base64(username:password).
plugins.contextPath: DotNetDockerPush: directory containing MaksIT.CertsUI and MaksIT.WebUI (repo src/).
plugins.images: DotNetDockerPush: [{ service, dockerfile, contextPath?, versionEnvFiles? }]. dockerfile and versionEnvFiles are relative to the image contextPath when set, otherwise plugin contextPath.
plugins.versionEnvFiles: DotNetDockerPush image option: array of files (relative to the image build context) where VITE_APP_VERSION is temporarily set to shared.version before docker build, then restored after build/push.
plugins.chartPath: DotNetHelmPush: directory containing Chart.yaml. Keep version/appVersion as placeholders in git (e.g. 0.0.0); DotNetHelmPush overwrites with bare semver from DotNetReleaseVersion (shared.version, e.g. 3.3.4, no v) before package/push; falls back to stripping v from shared.tag if version is missing.
plugins.ociRepository: DotNetHelmPush: OCI registry URL for helm push (e.g. oci://cr.maks-it.com/charts).
plugins.pushLatest: DotNetDockerPush: also push :latest (images also get bare :3.3.4 and :v3.3.4 from DotNetReleaseVersion). DotNetHelmPush: oras copy chart to :latest (requires oras on PATH).
plugins.branches: ReleasePublishGuard: allowed branches for publish (omit or ["*"] = any). Do not put branches on DotNetDockerPush/DotNetHelmPush/GitHub/DotNetNuGet.
plugins.tagVersionMustMatchDotNetRelease: ReleasePublishGuard: tag semver must equal DotNetReleaseVersion when true.
plugins.whenRequirementsNotMet: ReleasePublishGuard: skip (suppress publish plugins) or fail (exit 1).
plugins.requireCleanWorkingTree: ReleasePublishGuard: block publish if git status is not clean.
plugins.ensureTagOnRemote: ReleasePublishGuard: push tag to remote if missing.
plugins.remoteName: ReleasePublishGuard: git remote for tag push (default origin).
